understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level within its step budget, where a level is won only when every goal tile marked '+' is simultaneously occupied by selectable piece(s).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Positions were given in pixel coordinates with a 3-pixels-per-cell grid; MOVE actions shifted the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls/boundaries or altered by special interactions. Some adjacent objects (blocks) were pushable, moving along with the selected piece when pushed into an empty space, while walls ('#') acted as impassable obstacles that could prevent movement. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces; using CLICK with an exact object position switched which selectable was controlled. The movement_blocked flags were only hints about adjacency and did not fully determine whether a move would succeed.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level within its step budget, where a level is won only when every goal tile marked '+' is simultaneously occupied by selectable piece(s).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Positions were given in pixel coordinates with a 3-pixels-per-cell grid; MOVE actions shifted the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls/boundaries or altered by special interactions. Some adjacent objects (blocks) were pushable, moving along with the selected piece when pushed into an empty space, while walls ('#') acted as impassable obstacles that could prevent movement. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces; using CLICK with an exact object position switched which selectable was controlled. The movement_blocked flags were only hints about adjacency and did not fully determine whether a move would succeed.
